entity.summary: Historical Fantom decentralized exchange associated with the Dark Knight Finance and KnightSwap ecosystem, providing token swaps and liquidity-pool functions.
entity.notes: First-party source code preserves the Dark KnightSwap exchange, liquidity, analytics, documentation, and Fantom token references. A currently usable first-party trading interface was not independently verified in this review, so HEI uses inactive rather than active or dead. No terminal date or shutdown cause is inferred.

evidence.title: Dark KnightSwap first-party interface configuration
evidence.notes: First-party source code identifies Dark KnightSwap exchange and liquidity routes at darkdex.knightswap.financial, Fantom analytics, documentation, audit, and token references.

evidence.title: Dark KnightSwap exchange registry entry
evidence.notes: Entity-specific registry entry preserves the Dark KnightSwap identity and historical official domain. Registry presence alone is not treated as proof of current operability.
